title: tephrosia cephalophora
intro: Tephrosia cephalophora, also known as the Horsefly or Horse Fly Bush, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Tephrosia cephalophora include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and act as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia cephalophora are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
